mcpServers.description: PowerPoint presentation generation — pending MCP server availability. Target workers: Change Manager (CAB presentations), Command Center (executive briefings), Incident Manager (PIR presentations).

workers.name: Incident Manager
workers.description: Manages the full incident lifecycle from detection through resolution, minimising business impact and restoring normal service operation.

tools.name: show-incident-dashboard
tools.description: Display active incidents by priority with real-time status

tools.name: get-incidents
tools.description: Query incidents by state, priority, category, or assignment group

tools.name: create-incident
tools.description: Create a new incident record in ServiceNow

tools.name: update-incident
tools.description: Update an existing incident record fields or state

tools.name: correlate-incidents
tools.description: Find related incidents by CI, time window, or symptoms

tools.name: escalate-incident
tools.description: Escalate incident priority or assignment group

workers.name: Change Manager
workers.description: Controls the lifecycle of all changes to IT services, ensuring beneficial changes are made with minimum disruption through standardised methods and procedures.

tools.name: show-change-dashboard
tools.description: Display change request pipeline with status and risk scores

tools.name: get-change-requests
tools.description: Query change requests by state, type, risk, or schedule

tools.description: Create a new RFC in ServiceNow with risk assessment

tools.name: update-change-request
tools.description: Update an existing change request record

tools.name: prepare-change-request
tools.description: Draft a change request with auto-populated risk and impact fields

tools.name: detect-change-collisions
tools.description: Identify scheduling conflicts with other planned changes

tools.name: generate-cab-agenda
tools.description: Generate CAB meeting agenda from pending change requests

tools.name: post-implementation-review
tools.description: Generate PIR report comparing planned vs actual outcomes

tools.name: show-change-briefing
tools.description: Display executive briefing for upcoming change window

tools.name: show-change-metrics
tools.description: Display change success rate, lead time, and failure metrics

workers.name: Problem Manager
workers.description: Identifies root causes of incidents and drives permanent fixes through structured investigation, reducing recurring incidents and improving service stability.

tools.name: get-problems
tools.description: Query problem records by state, priority, or category

tools.name: create-problem
tools.description: Create a new problem record from incident trend analysis

tools.name: update-problem
tools.description: Update problem record with root cause or workaround

tools.name: search-known-errors
tools.description: Search the Known Error Database for matching issues

tools.name: trend-analysis
tools.description: Analyse incident patterns to identify potential problem candidates

workers.name: Knowledge Manager
workers.description: Curates and maintains the organisational knowledge base, ensuring articles are accurate, discoverable, and aligned with operational needs.

tools.name: search-knowledge

tools.name: create-kb-article
tools.description: Create a new knowledge base article

tools.name: update-kb-article
tools.description: Update an existing knowledge base article

tools.name: kb-gap-analysis
tools.description: Identify knowledge gaps from unresolved incident patterns

tools.name: kb-quality-audit
tools.description: Audit knowledge articles for staleness and accuracy

workers.name: Asset & CMDB Manager
workers.description: Maintains the configuration management database and IT asset inventory, ensuring accurate records of all CIs, their attributes, and relationships.
workers.itil_practice: IT Asset Management & Service Configuration Management

tools.description: Get configuration item details and attributes

tools.description: Map CI dependency graph and upstream/downstream impacts

tools.description: Update a configuration item record in the CMDB

tools.description: Query IT asset inventory with lifecycle status

tools.name: expired-warranty-report
tools.description: Find assets with expired or expiring warranties

workers.name: SLA Manager
workers.description: Monitors and manages service level agreements, tracking compliance, identifying breaches, and ensuring IT services meet agreed performance targets.

tools.description: Query SLA compliance records and breach status

tools.description: Generate SLA compliance report by service or team

tools.description: Send proactive SLA breach warning notifications

workers.name: Security Manager
workers.description: Manages information security incidents and ensures security considerations are embedded in change and service management processes.

tools.description: Display security posture metrics and threat landscape

workers.name: FinOps Manager
